reviews.review_description: Kept on glitching so a person just stands there while another guest comes in and doesnt move.  Restarted a few times, same result.

developer_response.body:
Hi DMcAree,

We are very sorry to hear that the game is currently unplayable for you. That glitch with the guests getting stuck and piling up sounds incredibly frustrating, especially since restarting didn't fix it.

This is definitely not the intended experience. We need to investigate why the NPCs are freezing like that. Could you please report this bug on our Discord at liminagames.com/discord ? We want to get this sorted out so you can actually play the game.

reviews.review_description:
Step into the shoes of a very “hands-on” customs officer whose job is to check passports, scan luggage, and wave your trusty metal detector around all kinds of suspicious characters. You can play it straight or embrace the chaos — there’s even a button to call security for the more troublesome passengers… or you can handle things your own way. (Have I ever shot someone without cause? I’ll only answer that with HR present. 😅)

Each wave brings a new line of quirky travellers with unique behaviours, keeping every round fresh and hilarious. The interactions are satisfyingly tactile, and the freedom to go by the book — or totally off the rails — makes this game ridiculously fun.

If you’ve ever dreamed of running your own chaotic customs checkpoint, this is your game. Funny, fast-paced, and endlessly replayable.

developer_response.body: Hi metaquesta99, thank you for your detailed feedback and kind words. We're thrilled to hear you're enjoying the mix of order and chaos! It's always great to see players having fun with both the serious and the silly sides of the game. Appreciate the nicely formatted expression of your thoughts — it really means a lot to our team!

Hi mason.27.2025,

Thank you for the 5 stars!

developer_response.body:
Hi KV7890,

Thanks for the feedback. 

To know who to deny, you need to look for discrepancies—check if their passport is expired or if they have forbidden items in their luggage.

If you are still stuck, feel free to hop into our Discord at liminagames.com/discord for some tips. Good luck!
